title: routing.json v4 schema (roles → profile roleMap → target, shared matrix) + seed 3 Profiles + pure byte-stable compiler (--check) + resolver core

Resolver: exception→role, cell→role, row-default, column-default, global-default, AND profile roleMap role→target (same matrix, balanced→cc-opus-high vs economy→cc-ollama-qwen) + discipline overrides. Full suite 517 passed / 9 skipped / 2 env-flaky.

video.note: Backend slice; the MR-wave consolidated walkthrough is filmed at MR2 (router view + simulator).

notes: BRIEF v4 ADAPTATION (recorded per brief §intro 'adapt the mechanism but preserve each decision's intent, and record the adaptation'): the v2 FLOW_PLAN scoped MR1a as 'routing.json + 3 Profiles + compiler', resolving matrix→target. BRIEF v4 inserts the ROLE layer: the matrix + exceptions resolve to a fixed-vocabulary ROLE (expert|standard|fast|image|video|review), the matrix/exceptions/tierDefinitions/continuations/discipline are SHARED across Profiles, and a Profile is just its roleMap (role→target-id) + disciplineOverrides. routing.json now carries {version, activeProfile, roles, taskTypes, tiers, tierDefinitions, exceptions[], matrix{defaults,columns,rows}, discipline{tier→fields}, continuations[], targets[] (runtime-target | secondary | workflow), profiles{<name>:{preRoute, roleMap, disciplineOverrides}}}. Seed targets include multi-provider runtime-targets (anthropic-plan opus/sonnet/haiku + ollama-local qwen/deepseek + a pinned haiku classifier) and secondary:gemini/codex (image/video/coding delegation), realising the v4 'no capability skills — every model/capability is a runtime' decision in the config vocabulary. The pure core lives at fittings/seed/model-router/lib/routing-core.mjs (dependency-free so the bare-node own-port server in MR2 imports it directly; typed by routing-core.d.mts for the runner's MR1b assembly + vitest). This slice also lands the resolver (resolveRole/resolveRoute/resolveDiscipline) that MR1c's Stage A wires to the warm classifier — its unit coverage is here. The orphaned gitignored fittings/seed/model-router/dist/ stray was left untouched (not part of this fitting's source). Satisfies brief §3 tokens routing-compile-ok, profiles-compile-ok, continuations-compile-ok.
